# utf16

```go
import "unicode/utf16"
```

Package utf16 implements encoding and decoding of UTF\-16 sequences.

## Index

- [func AppendRune\(a \[\]uint16, r rune\) \[\]uint16](<#AppendRune>)
- [func Decode\(s \[\]uint16\) \[\]rune](<#Decode>)
- [func DecodeRune\(r1, r2 rune\) rune](<#DecodeRune>)
- [func Encode\(s \[\]rune\) \[\]uint16](<#Encode>)
- [func EncodeRune\(r rune\) \(r1, r2 rune\)](<#EncodeRune>)
- [func IsSurrogate\(r rune\) bool](<#IsSurrogate>)
- [func RuneLen\(r rune\) int](<#RuneLen>)

<a name="AppendRune"></a>

## func [AppendRune](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/unicode/utf16/utf16.go#L100>)

```go
func AppendRune(a []uint16, r rune) []uint16
```

AppendRune appends the UTF\-16 encoding of the Unicode code point r to the end of p and returns the extended buffer. If the rune is not a valid Unicode code point, it appends the encoding of U\+FFFD.

<a name="Decode"></a>

## func [Decode](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/unicode/utf16/utf16.go#L116>)

```go
func Decode(s []uint16) []rune
```

Decode returns the Unicode code point sequence represented by the UTF\-16 encoding s.

<a name="DecodeRune"></a>

## func [DecodeRune](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/unicode/utf16/utf16.go#L37>)

```go
func DecodeRune(r1, r2 rune) rune
```

DecodeRune returns the UTF\-16 decoding of a surrogate pair. If the pair is not a valid UTF\-16 surrogate pair, DecodeRune returns the Unicode replacement code point U\+FFFD.

<a name="Encode"></a>

## func [Encode](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/unicode/utf16/utf16.go#L69>)

```go
func Encode(s []rune) []uint16
```

Encode returns the UTF\-16 encoding of the Unicode code point sequence s.

<a name="EncodeRune"></a>

## func [EncodeRune](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/unicode/utf16/utf16.go#L47>)

```go
func EncodeRune(r rune) (r1, r2 rune)
```

EncodeRune returns the UTF\-16 surrogate pair r1, r2 for the given rune. If the rune is not a valid Unicode code point or does not need encoding, EncodeRune returns U\+FFFD, U\+FFFD.

<a name="IsSurrogate"></a>

## func [IsSurrogate](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/unicode/utf16/utf16.go#L30>)

```go
func IsSurrogate(r rune) bool
```

IsSurrogate reports whether the specified Unicode code point can appear in a surrogate pair.

<a name="RuneLen"></a>

## func [RuneLen](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/unicode/utf16/utf16.go#L57>)

```go
func RuneLen(r rune) int
```

RuneLen returns the number of 16\-bit words in the UTF\-16 encoding of the rune. It returns \-1 if the rune is not a valid value to encode in UTF\-16.
